message:
feat(conformance,dtype): expand dtype promotion and parity verification infrastructure

Add FNP-P2C-002 parity verification artifacts and expand the dtype
and conformance crates with 306+ new lines.

Artifacts:
- FNP-P2C-001: Add unit_property_evidence.json, update parity reports
  (decode_proof, raptorq, main)
- FNP-P2C-002: Add fixture_manifest.json, parity_gate.yaml, and three
  parity report variants; update packet_readiness_report.json

Code:
- fnp-conformance/src/lib.rs: +177 lines expanding conformance test
  infrastructure with new dtype promotion verification harnesses
- fnp-conformance/fixtures/dtype_promotion_cases.json: +56 lines of
  new dtype promotion test cases
- fnp-dtype/src/lib.rs: +74 lines expanding dtype promotion logic
  with additional type coercion rules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
